description_for_model: AI-Powered Destiny Forecast. 5 modern AI agents cross-validate with 5 ancient Chinese manuscripts (900+ years old) to predict life outcomes. Not fortune-telling — probability-based fore-sight.
description_for_human: AI destiny forecast powered by ancient Eastern mysticism and modern multi-agent AI.
usage_policy: Free tier: 5 predictions/day per IP. Premium: $9.99/month unlimited. Deep: $4.99/analysis.
